_doc: Per-archetype level-1 class features (structured for the dnd5e `feat` Item type). Plus a parallel `_backgrounds` map for background-derived perks. Loaded by ai_dm.app.character_features.

warrior.name: Second Wind
warrior.description: Once per short rest, regain 1d10 + your level HP as a bonus action.

rogue.name: Sneak Attack 1d6
rogue.description: Once per turn, +1d6 damage to a creature you have advantage on, or that has an enemy of yours within 5 ft.

rogue.name: Thieves' Cant
rogue.description: A secret mix of dialect, jargon, and code letting you hide messages in plain speech.

witch.name: Hex Mark
witch.description: You bear a witch-mark that aches in the presence of malign spirits.

witch.name: Old Pact
witch.description: A patron in the unseen realm grants your magic — and asks favours in return.

scholar.name: Ritual Caster
scholar.description: You may cast any spell in your spellbook with the ritual tag without expending a slot (10 minutes longer).

scholar.name: Expertise: Lore
scholar.description: Double your proficiency bonus on Arcana, History, and Religion checks.

exiled_noble.name: Position of Privilege
exiled_noble.description: Even in exile, your bearing opens doors that bar commoners.

forbidden_scholar.name: Researcher's Eye
forbidden_scholar.description: When you don't know a fact, you usually know who to ask.

wandering_mage.name: Wayfarer
wandering_mage.description: You always know which way is north and how long until dawn.

hedge_witch.name: Village Remedy
hedge_witch.description: Given an hour and local plants, you can brew a poultice that grants advantage on the next death save.

sellsword.name: Guild Contacts
sellsword.description: A network of mercenaries — there's usually somebody in any town who owes you a drink.
